title: Huge turnout for ‘Dodda Jathre’ in Nanjangud, one of the biggest chariot festivals in Karnataka
description: The ‘Pancha Maha Rathotsava’, considered one of the biggest chariot festivals in Karnataka, features five richly decorated chariots — Sri Ganesha Ratha, Gauthama Ratha, Parvathi Ratha, Subramanya Ratha, and Chandikeshwara Ratha — pulled by devotees around the temple
